tasks.title: Fix useAgentCompletion — replace prevTasksRef with updatedAt predicate
tasks.description: Remove the prevTasksRef / done-column-diff logic from useAgentCompletion.ts. Replace with a direct comparison: task.updatedAt >= activeRun.startedAt. Ensures pipeline stages 2–4 are detected correctly. Update/add unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: prevTasksRef and prevDoneIds logic removed from useAgentCompletion
Completion fires when task.id === activeRun.taskId AND task is in done column AND task.updatedAt >= activeRun.startedAt
clearActiveRun() is called exactly once per run completion
advancePipeline() is called for pipeline stages that are not the last
After final pipeline stage completes, pipelineState.status becomes 'completed' and clears after 3 s
Existing useAgentCompletion tests pass; new test cases cover pipeline stage 2+ scenario

tasks.title: Fix usePolling — adaptive interval (1 s during active run, 3 s idle)
tasks.description: Modify usePolling.ts to read activeRun from the store. Use a 1000 ms interval when activeRun is non-null, 3000 ms otherwise. Restart the setInterval when the interval value changes. Update tests.
acceptance_criteria: usePolling uses 1000 ms interval when useAppStore.getState().activeRun is non-null
usePolling uses 3000 ms interval when activeRun is null
Interval restarts correctly when activeRun changes (null → value or value → null)
isMutating guard still applies at both intervals
usePolling unit tests updated to verify interval switching

tasks.title: QA: verify pipeline progress advances and closes correctly
tasks.description: Manual and/or automated E2E verification that the pipeline progress bar advances through all stages and the AgentRunIndicator closes after the final stage. Covers the two reported symptoms.
acceptance_criteria: Launching a single agent run: AgentRunIndicator appears, disappears automatically after task moves to done
Launching a full 4-stage pipeline: PipelineProgressBar stage node advances from 1→2→3→4 as each stage completes
After stage 4 completes, PipelineProgressBar shows 'completed' state and auto-dismisses within 3 s
AgentRunIndicator is hidden (not visible) after each stage's clearActiveRun() fires
Aborting a pipeline mid-run clears both the indicator and progress bar
